title: Align e2e build output assertions with CLI artifact labels

source.subject: fix(e2e): align build output assertions with CLI artifact labels

body:
## What shipped

E2e CLI tests assert build output using the same artifact labels the `beskid build` CLI emits, reducing brittle path checks.

## Source commit

Repository **`compiler`** · commit `bf32227`

> fix(e2e): align build output assertions with CLI artifact labels

## Completed

2026-05-23 (catalog cutoff window).
